text:
"Serving the community for 80 years, this is Havoc's, your neighborhood general store!"

A small-town General Store in the Eastern Region of Amestris run by the parents of Jean Havoc, this shop has provided a standard and necessary basic service to its community for eighty years. But it is revealed that, since Jean began working there as a receptionist and clerk due to his spinal injury, it has blossomed into a very extensive and efficient black market for smuggled items such as foreign weaponry and sophisticated combat vehicles. When Colonel Roy Mustang begins his coup d'état in Central City, Havoc provides surprise backup from this facility - sending Maria Ross and Rebecca Catalina in an armored vehicle disguised as an ice cream truck to support the Colonel's team.
